name: claude-replit
description: Replit-style web IDE with a live Expo phone preview and tap-to-edit

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,ide,web,metro -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "pnpm --filter @cr/backend dev" "pnpm --filter @cr/ide-web dev" "pnpm --filter @cr/template-app web" "pnpm --filter @cr/template-app metro"
